string.value: #b#@1012003:##k in #bHenesys#k claims to know the location indicated on the #rDirty Treasure Map#k. Let's go find him.

He says he's certain that he's seen it while he was visiting #bNautilus#k, and suggests you go to #b#m100030000##k to search and investigate the area.\n\nReport back to #b#@1012003:##k in #bHenesys#k upon completion.
#b#@1012003:##k in #bHenesys#k says it is necessary that you look into the emblem on the #rOld Worn-out Paper#k. Let's talk to him.

string.name: rewardSummary
string.value: Exp 4,500 Able to proceed to 'Where Are the Treasures?' as next quest.

I'm sure this place isn't too far from here. I've seen it before.
I think I was on my way to #bThe Nautilus#k.

Oh, I remember!

This place must have been in #b#m100030000##k.
In fact, I'm sure of it. If you go there, you'll be able to find the place on this Map.

Go and scope things out in that area. And by scoping things out, I mean using your Regular Attacks.
You're back already? Let's see what you found.
This was definitely not worth an entire trip around Victoria Island.\nI can't help but feel somewhat irritated looking at the drawings on this piece of paper.
